repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

sensor ACOUSTIC_SENSOR_BASIC_BASE WSF_ACOUSTIC_SENSOR
   on
   frame_time 1 sec
   scan_mode both
   reports_bearing
   reports_elevation
   reports_signal_to_noise
end_sensor

platform_type BLUE_SENSOR_UNIT_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 60 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor acoustic_sensor_basic ACOUSTIC_SENSOR_BASIC_BASE
   end_sensor
end_platform_type

platform_type RED_TARGET_UNIT_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 60 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform blue_sensor_unit BLUE_SENSOR_UNIT_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e speed 20 knots
   end_route
   sensor acoustic_sensor_basic
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

platform red_target_unit RED_TARGET_UNIT_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 30.69n 104.11e speed 20 knots
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/acoustic_simple_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 120 sec
